de.title: Microsoft Business Central Spezialist
de.description: Karriere Microsoft Business Central Specialist Share this job: Microsoft Business Central SpecialistMicrosoft Business Central Specialistcorporate.lastminute.comhttps://corporate.lastminute.com/careers/job/?id=744000108434226&jobName=Microsoft%20Business%20Central%20Specialist Das Unternehmen Bei lastminute.com leben wir für die Ferien. Wir sind der europäische Travel‑Tech-Leader in dynamischen Urlaubs‑Paketen. Mit Technologie verwandeln wir spontane Gedanken in sinnvolle Erlebnisse und helfen Menschen, die Welt zu bereisen. ## Stellenbeschreibung Wir suchen einen MS Business Central Specialist, der unserem Team in Chiasso beitritt und unserem Unternehmen von rund 1.700 Mitarbeitern weltweit hilft, die Reise der Reisenden für Millionen von Urlaubern zu optimieren. Wenn Sie ein Meister im Arbeiten an ERP‑Lösungen sind, lesen Sie weiter, Sie könnten die perfekte Besetzung für diese Stelle sein. Kurz zum Job: Job Title - MS Business Central Specialist Working model - Hybrid von Chiasso Team - Sie werden dem Finance Systems Engineering Team beitreten Level - Professionell Location - Chiasso, Schweiz Contract - Unbefristet – Vollzeit (36 h/Woche) ## Ihre Wirkung wird sein: - Analyse und Gestaltung von Geschäftsprozessen und Erstellung von Funktionsspezifikationen basierend auf Informationen von Geschäftsbenutzern, um Lösungen zur Verbesserung der Effizienz und Effektivität unseres ERP-Systems Microsoft Dynamics Business Central zu empfehlen und bereitzustellen - Teilnahme an systembezogenen Geschäfts­entwicklungsprojekten - Bereitstellung von Schulungen und Support für Business Central‑Benutzer innerhalb der Microsoft Business Central-Anwendung - Erstellung von Business Central‑Funktionsspezifikationen für Konfiguration, Integration mit Drittanbieter‑Anwendungen und Business Central‑Anpassungen - Erstellung von Dokumentation, Schulungsmaterialien und Demonstrationen für Business Central‑Benutzer; - Zusammenarbeit mit Business und anderen Unternehmensabteilungen - Beitrag zur Wissensdatenbank und Wissensaustausch für Business Central‑Upgrades - Bereitstellung fortlaufenden Supports für Benutzer, Verwaltung von Operations‑Tickets zur Anwendung von Einstellungen, Konfigurationen, Erstellung und Widerruf von Benutzerkonten, Behebung von Laufzeitfehlern - Unterstützung des Implementierungslebenszyklus unter Einhaltung der Prinzipien von Quellcode‑Kontrolle und CI/CD Job title: Brand: lastminute.com Department: Technology Location: Chiasso, Schweiz Contract: Full-time Main Language: English Apply now ## Qualifikationen Ihre Expertise : - 3+ Jahre Erfahrung mit MS Business Central oder MS Dynamics NAV - Fortgeschrittene Kenntnisse der Module und Funktionen von MS Business Central, einschließlich Finanzmanagement, G/L, Dimensionen, Unternehmenskonfiguration, Einkaufs/Verkaufs‑Module - Erfahrung in AL‑Codierung und Git‑Methodik - Fortgeschrittene analytische und Problemlösungsfähigkeiten - Fließend in Englisch, schriftlich und mündlich Wünschenswert : - Erfahrung in Systemintegration und API/Webservices‑Funktionalität - Kenntnisse von Microsoft SQL Server - Kenntnisse der SaaS Business Central‑Architektur Soft Skills : - Analytisch und orientiert zu Details, aber pragmatisch und ergebnisorientiert - Starke Teamorientierung mit der Fähigkeit, effektiv in funktionsübergreifenden Teams zu arbeiten - Neugierig, proaktiv und motiviert, Technologien jenseits der ERP‑Welt zu erlernen - Autonom und verantwortungsbewusst – Sie übernehmen die Verantwortung von Design bis Lieferung - Leidenschaftlich für die Verbesserung von Systemen, Prozessen und der Gesamtcodequalität ## Zusätzliche Informationen Warum Sie bei uns arbeiten sollten: - Arbeiten an einer Finance Core Platform, die für die Transformation und Skalierbarkeit von lastminute.com strategisch ist. - Zusammenarbeit in einer internationalen, schnelllebigen Umgebung mit starken Engineering‑Communities. - Teil einer funktionsübergreifenden Kultur sein, die Lernen, Experimentieren und kontinuierliche Verbesserung schätzt. - Beitrag zur nächsten Generation der Finanzsystemarchitektur für einen europäischen Travel‑Tech‑Leader. ## Vorteile der Zusammenarbeit mit uns: Wie wir zusammenarbeiten: - Ein inklusives, freundliches und internationales Umfeld (Sie arbeiten mit Kollegen aus über 10 Ländern und mehr als 48 Nationalitäten) - Kürzere Arbeitswoche (36h als Vollzeit), mit einem halben Arbeitstag am Freitag - Flexible Start- und Endzeiten des Arbeitstages, mit Kernzeiten von 10:00 bis 16:00 Uhr - Möglichkeit, für einen definierten Zeitraum pro Jahr von überall aus zu arbeiten, je nach lokalen Vorschriften Wie wir gemeinsam lernen: - Fri‑Yays: halber Tag am Freitagmorgen mit einem No‑Meeting‑Mandat und gewidmetem tiefen Arbeiten, persönlichem Wachstum, Lernen und Training und/oder Fokuszeit. - Professionelle und Management‑Skills‑Entwicklungspfade, Zugang zu E‑Learning‑Plattformen wie O’reilly, Udemy, Coursera (je nach Abteilung), und zu unserer internen Plattform mit maßgeschneiderten Trainingsinhalten Weitere Vorteile: - 2 bezahlte Tage pro Jahr für Freiwilligenarbeit - Gelegentliche soziale Veranstaltungen zur Förderung von Verbindungen zwischen Kollegen - Reise‑Branchen‑Rabatte und exklusive Staff‑Fares - Wir unterstützen unsere Mitarbeiter durch bedeutende Lebensmomente mit Urlaubsoptionen (z. B. Elternpflichten, Ehen, Trauer, Umzüge, usw.) in Übereinstimmung mit lokalen Gesetzen. Wünschten Sie sich hier zu sein? Wir auch! ## Schritte des Auswahlprozesses*: - HR‑Interview (15‑30 Minuten) - Manager‑Interview und Team‑Interview - Offline‑Test - Angebot ausgedehnt (*Bitte beachten Sie, dass der Prozess leicht variieren kann. Der zuständige Recruiter teilt weitere Details bei der Terminvereinbarung des Interviews) ## Unser Engagement für Vielfalt und Zugehörigkeit - Im Kern unserer Kultur steht das Engagement für Inklusion in Bezug auf Rasse, Geschlecht, Alter, sexuelle Orientierung, Religion, Geschlechtsidentität oder Ausdruck und Barrierefreiheit. Wir glauben fest an einen gleichberechtigten Raum, der einladend ist und die Einzigartigkeit aller, die hier arbeiten, feiert. Wir schätzen unterschiedliche Lebenserfahrungen und respektieren Standpunkte, denn wir wissen, dass Einzigartigkeit Innovation antreibt. Wir wollen sicherstellen, dass unsere Menschen die Gemeinschaften weltweit widerspiegeln, denen wir beim Reisen helfen. ## Berechtigungskriterien: - Durch das Einreichen Ihrer Informationen und Bewerbung bestätigen Sie, dass Sie gesetzlich berechtigt sind, im Beschäftigungsland zu arbeiten und dass Sie keine Visasponsoring benötigen, um einen Arbeitsvisastatus zu erhalten. Zurück zur Jobsuche

fr.title: Spécialiste Microsoft Business Central
fr.description: Carrières Microsoft Business Central Specialist Share this job: Microsoft Business Central SpecialistMicrosoft Business Central Specialistcorporate.lastminute.comhttps://corporate.lastminute.com/careers/job/?id=744000108434226&jobName=Microsoft%20Business%20Central%20Specialist L'entreprise Chez lastminute.com, nous vivons pour les vacances. Nous sommes le leader européen Travel‑Tech dans les forfaits vacances dynamiques. Grâce à la technologie, nous transformons les pensées spontanées en expériences significatives, aidant les gens à voyager à travers le monde. ## Description du poste Nous recherchons un MS Business Central Specialist pour rejoindre notre équipe basée à Chiasso et notre entreprise d'environ 1 700 personnes dans le monde afin de nous aider à dynamiser le parcours du voyageur pour des millions de vacanciers. Si vous êtes un maître dans le travail sur des solutions ERP, continuez à lire, vous pourriez être le candidat idéal pour ce poste. Le poste en bref : Job Title - MS Business Central Specialist Working model - hybride depuis Chiasso Team - vous rejoindrez l'équipe Finance Systems Engineering Level - Professionnel Location - Chiasso, Suisse Contract - Permanent – temps plein (36 h/semaine) ## Votre impact sera : - Analyser et concevoir les processus métier et créer des spécifications fonctionnelles basées sur les informations recueillies auprès des utilisateurs métier afin de recommander et de fournir des solutions pour améliorer l'efficacité et l'efficacité de notre système ERP Microsoft Dynamics Business Central - Participer à des projets de développement commercial liés au système - Fournir une formation et un support aux utilisateurs Business Central au sein de l'application Microsoft Business Central - Créer des spécifications fonctionnelles Business Central pour la configuration, l'intégration avec des applications tierces et les personnalisations Business Central - Produire de la documentation, des supports de formation et des démonstrations pour les utilisateurs Business Central; - Collaborer avec les départements Business et autres départements de l'entreprise - Contribuer à la base de connaissances et au transfert de connaissances pour les mises à jour Business Central - Fournir un support continu aux utilisateurs, gérer les tickets d'opérations pour appliquer les configurations, créer et révoquer les comptes utilisateurs, corriger les erreurs d'exécution - Soutenir le cycle de vie de mise en œuvre en suivant les principes de contrôle de source et CI/CD Job title: Brand: lastminute.com Department: Technology Location: Chiasso, Suisse Contract: Full-time Main Language: English Apply now ## Qualifications Votre expertise : - 3+ années d'expérience avec MS Business Central ou MS Dynamics NAV - Connaissances avancées des modules et fonctionnalités de MS Business Central, incluant gestion financière, G/L, dimensions, configuration d'entreprise, modules Achats/Ventes - Expérience en AL Coding et méthodologie Git - Compétences analytiques et de résolution de problèmes avancées - Maîtrise de l'anglais, à l'écrit et à l'oral Souhaitable : - Expérience en intégration de systèmes, API/Webservices, Microsoft SQL Server et architecture SaaS Business Central (souhaitable) Compétences douces : - Analytique, orienté détail, mais pragmatique et axé sur la livraison - Forte mentalité de collaboration avec la capacité de travailler efficacement dans des équipes transversales - Curieux, proactif et motivé à apprendre des technologies au-delà du monde ERP - Autonome et responsable — vous prenez la responsabilité du design à la livraison - Passionné par l'amélioration des systèmes, des processus et de la qualité globale du code ## Informations supplémentaires Pourquoi nous rejoindre : - Travailler sur une plateforme Finance Core qui est stratégique pour la transformation et l'évolutivité de lastminute.com. - Collaborer dans un environnement international, rapide, avec de fortes communautés d'ingénierie. - Faire partie d'une culture transversale qui valorise l'apprentissage, l'expérimentation et l'amélioration continue. - Contribuer à la prochaine génération d'architecture des systèmes financiers pour un leader européen du travel‑tech. ## Avantages de travailler avec nous : Comment nous travaillons ensemble : - Un environnement inclusif, convivial et international (vous travaillerez avec des collègues de plus de 10 pays et plus de 48 nationalités) - Semaine de travail plus courte (36h comme temps plein), avec un demi-jour de travail le vendredi - Horaires de début et de fin flexibles, avec des heures de cœur de 10:00 à 16:00 - Possibilité de travailler de n'importe où pendant une période définie par an selon les réglementations locales Comment nous apprenons ensemble : - Fri‑Yays : demi-journée le vendredi matin avec un mandat sans réunion et dédié au travail profond, à la croissance personnelle, à l'apprentissage et à la formation et/ou au temps de concentration. - Parcours de formation pour le développement de compétences professionnelles et managériales, accès à des plateformes e‑learning telles que O’reilly, Udemy, Coursera (selon le département), et à notre plateforme interne offrant du contenu de formation sur mesure Autres avantages : - 2 jours de congés payés par an pour des activités de bénévolat - Événements sociaux occasionnels pour favoriser les connexions entre collègues - Réductions dans l'industrie du voyage et tarifs exclusifs flash pour le personnel - Nous soutenons nos employés à travers les moments significatifs de la vie avec des options de congé (par ex. responsabilités parentales, mariages, deuils, déménagements, etc.) conformément aux lois locales. Vous aimeriez être ici ? Nous aussi ! ## Étapes du processus de sélection* : - Entretien HR (15-30 minutes) - Entretien manager et équipe - Test hors ligne - Offre étendue (*Veuillez noter que le processus peut légèrement varier. Le recruteur en charge partagera plus de détails lors de la prise de rendez-vous pour l'entretien) ## Notre engagement à célébrer la diversité et à générer un sentiment d'appartenance - Au cœur de notre culture se trouve l'engagement envers l'inclusion en fonction de la race, du genre, de l'âge, de l'orientation sexuelle, de la religion, de l'identité de genre ou de l'expression, et de l'accessibilité. Nous croyons fermement en un espace d'égalité des chances, accueillant et célébrant l'unicité de chacun qui travaille ici. Nous apprécions les différentes expériences vécues et respectons les points de vue, car nous savons que l'unicité stimule l'innovation. Nous voulons nous assurer que nos personnes reflètent les communautés à travers le monde que nous aidons à voyager. ## Critères d'éligibilité : - En soumettant vos informations et votre candidature, vous confirmez que vous êtes légalement autorisé à travailler dans le pays d'emploi et que vous n'avez pas besoin de parrainage de visa pour obtenir le statut de visa de travail. Retour à la recherche d'emploi

Solide expérience en AL Coding et méthodologie Git

en.title: Software Engineer – ETLs & Microservices
en.description: Descrizione Software Engineer – ETLs Careers Software Engineer – ETLs & Microservices Share this job: Software Engineer – ETLs & MicroservicesSoftware Engineer – ETLs & Microservicescorporate.lastminute.comhttps://corporate.lastminute.com/careers/job/?id=744000108444345&jobName=Software%20Engineer%20%E2%80%93%20ETLs ## The Company At lastminute.com, we live for the holidays. We are the European Travel-Tech leader in Dynamic Holiday Packages. With technology, we turn spontaneous thoughts into meaningful experiences, helping people travel the world. ## Job Description We are looking for a Software Engineer – Microservices & ETLs to join our team of around 1,700 people worldwide to help us power up the traveller’s journey for millions of holidaymakers. If you are passionate about building scalable microservices, developing robust APIs, and modernizing data integration workflows, keep on reading, you might be the perfect fit for this role. ## The job in brief: - Job Title - Software Engineer - Working model - hybrid from Chiasso - Team - you will join the Finance Systems Engineering team - Level - Professional - Location - Chiasso, Switzerland - Contract - Permanent – full-time (36 h/week) ## What your impact will be: - Modernize legacy processes: Gradually transition monolithic ETL workflows toward a microservices-based ecosystem, identifying opportunities to reduce technical debt. - Develop microservices: Design, write, and test high-quality software using practices such as TDD, DDD, Clean Code, and SOLID principles. - Support data infrastructure: Maintain and optimize existing ETL pipelines built with Talend 7/8, ensuring full business continuity through effective KLO (Keep-the-Lights-On) activities. - Automate Finance operations: Collaborate closely with Finance stakeholders to understand their needs and deliver solutions that automate manual or recurring processes. - Job title: - Brand: lastminute.com - Department: Technology - Location: Chiasso, Switzerland - Contract: Full-time - Main Language: English - Apply now ## Qualifications ### Your expertise: - 1+ years of experience in software development, with hands-on experience using an OO/FP language — preferably Java or Kotlin - Understanding of microservices architecture, REST API design patterns, and backend development - Solid SQL skills and previous experience working with relational databases (MySQL, Vertica, PostgreSQL, or similar) - Previous experience with ETL tools or data integration platforms (Talend, Informatica, SSIS, or similar) - Ability to work effectively in a cross-functional, multilingual environment, translating business requirements into technical solutions and sharing knowledge with peers ### Desirable: - Background in financial systems, e-commerce, or the travel industry - Experience specifically with Talend 7 or Talend 8 - Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and DevOps practices - Experience using Git and version control workflows - Previous experience with Clean Code, SOLID principles, and an Agile mindset - Experience working with the Spring/Spring Boot ecosystem ## Additional Information ### Perks of working with us: #### How we work together: - An inclusive, friendly, and international environment (you’ll be working with colleagues from +10 countries and over 48 nationalities) - Shorter working week (36h as full time), with a half working day on Fridays - Flexible start and end of the working day, with core hours from 10:00 to 4:00 pm - Possibility to work from anywhere for a period of time per year defined according to local regulations #### How we learn together: - Fri-Yays: half a day on Friday morning with a no-meeting mandate and dedicated to deep work, personal growth, learning and training and/or focus time. - Professional and managerial skills development training paths, access to e-learning platforms such as O’reilly, Udemy, Coursera (depending on the department), and to our internal platform offering bespoke training content #### Other perks: - 2 paid days off per year for volunteering purposes - Occasional social events to foster connections among colleagues - Travel industry discounts and flash exclusive staff fares - We support our employees through life’s significant moments with leave options (e.g parental responsibilities, marriages, bereavements, relocations, etc.) in line with local laws. - Wish you were here? We do, too! ### Selection process steps*: - HR interview (15-30 minutes) - Manager Interview - Technical Test - Offer extended (*Please note the process can slightly vary. The recruiter in charge will share more details when setting up the interview) ### Our commitment to celebrate diversity and generate belonging At the heart of our culture is a commitment to inclusion across race, gender, age, sexual orientation, religion, gender identity or expression, and accessibility. We strongly believe in an equal opportunity space, which is welcoming and celebrates the uniqueness of everyone who works here. We value different lived experiences and respect viewpoints, as we know unicity drives innovation. We want to make sure our people reflect the communities across the world we help travel. ### Eligibility criteria: By submitting your information and application, you confirm that you are legally authorised to work in the country of employment and that you do not require visa sponsorship to obtain employment visa status. Back to Job Search

Full-time Main Language:

it.title: Ingegnere Software – ETL e Microservizi
it.description: Descrizione Software Engineer – ETLs Careers Software Engineer – ETLs & Microservices Share this job: Software Engineer – ETLs & MicroservicesSoftware Engineer – ETLs & Microservicescorporate.lastminute.comhttps://corporate.lastminute.com/careers/job/?id=744000108444345&jobName=Software%20Engineer%20%E2%80%93%20ETLs ## L'azienda In lastminute.com viviamo per le vacanze. Siamo il leader europeo Travel‑Tech nei Pacchetti Vacanza Dinamici. Con la tecnologia, trasformiamo pensieri spontanei in esperienze significative, aiutando le persone a viaggiare per il mondo. ## Descrizione del lavoro Stiamo cercando un Ingegnere Software – Microservizi & ETL da inserire nel nostro team di circa 1.700 persone in tutto il mondo, per potenziare il viaggio dei milioni di viaggiatori. Se sei appassionato di costruire microservizi scalabili, sviluppare API robuste e modernizzare i flussi di integrazione dati, continua a leggere: potresti essere la persona giusta per questo ruolo. ## Il ruolo in sintesi: - Titolo del lavoro – Ingegnere Software - Modello di lavoro – ibrido da Chiasso - Team – ti unirai al team Finance Systems Engineering - Livello – Professionale - Sede – Chiasso, Svizzera - Contratto – Permanente – tempo pieno (36 h/settimana) ## Il tuo impatto sarà: - Modernizzare i processi legacy: migrare gradualmente i flussi ETL monolitici verso un ecosistema basato su microservizi, individuando opportunità per ridurre il debito tecnico. - Sviluppare microservizi: progettare, scrivere e testare software di alta qualità usando pratiche come TDD, DDD, Clean Code e i principi SOLID. - Supportare l'infrastruttura dati: mantenere e ottimizzare i pipeline ETL esistenti costruiti con Talend 7/8, garantendo la continuità operativa tramite attività KLO (Keep‑the‑Lights‑On). - Automatizzare le operazioni finanziarie: collaborare a stretto contatto con gli stakeholder Finance per comprendere le loro esigenze e fornire soluzioni che automatizzino processi manuali o ricorrenti. - Titolo del lavoro: - Brand: lastminute.com - Dipartimento: Technology - Sede: Chiasso, Svizzera - Contratto: Full‑time - Lingua principale: Inglese

de.description: Descrizione Software Engineer – ETLs Careers Software Engineer – ETLs & Microservices Share this job: Software Engineer – ETLs & MicroservicesSoftware Engineer – ETLs & Microservicescorporate.lastminute.comhttps://corporate.lastminute.com/careers/job/?id=744000108444345&jobName=Software%20Engineer%20%E2%80%93%20ETLs ## Das Unternehmen Bei lastminute.com leben wir für die Feiertage. Wir sind der europäische Travel‑Tech‑Marktführer für dynamische Urlaubspakete. Mit Technologie verwandeln wir spontane Gedanken in bedeutungsvolle Erlebnisse und helfen Menschen, die Welt zu bereisen. ## Stellenbeschreibung Wir suchen einen Softwareentwickler – Microservices & ETL, der unser Team von rund 1.700 Mitarbeitenden weltweit verstärkt, um die Reise von Millionen Urlaubern zu optimieren. Wenn Sie leidenschaftlich gerne skalierbare Microservices bauen, robuste APIs entwickeln und Datenintegrations‑Workflows modernisieren, lesen Sie weiter – Sie könnten perfekt zu dieser Rolle passen. ## Kurzbeschreibung der Stelle: - Titel – Software Engineer - Arbeitsmodell – hybrid von Chiasso - Team – Sie werden dem Finance Systems Engineering Team beitreten - Level – Professional - Standort – Chiasso, Schweiz - Vertrag – Unbefristet – Vollzeit (36 h/Woche) ## Ihr Beitrag wird sein: - Modernisieren von Legacy‑Prozessen: Schrittweise Migration monolithischer ETL‑Workflows zu einem Microservices‑basierten Ökosystem, um technische Schulden zu reduzieren. - Entwicklung von Microservices: Entwerfen, schreiben und testen hochwertiger Software nach TDD, DDD, Clean‑Code‑ und SOLID‑Prinzipien. - Unterstützung der Dateninfrastruktur: Pflege und Optimierung bestehender ETL‑Pipelines mit Talend 7/8, Gewährleistung der Business‑Continuity durch KLO‑Aktivitäten (Keep‑the‑Lights‑On). - Automatisierung von Finanzprozessen: Enge Zusammenarbeit mit Finance‑Stakeholdern, um deren Bedürfnisse zu verstehen und Lösungen zu liefern, die manuelle oder wiederkehrende Prozesse automatisieren. - Jobtitel: - Marke: lastminute.com - Abteilung: Technology - Standort: Chiasso, Schweiz - Vertrag: Vollzeit - Hauptsprache: Englisch - Jetzt bewerben ## Qualifikationen ### Ihre Fachkenntnisse: - 1+ Jahre Erfahrung in der Softwareentwicklung, praktische Erfahrung mit einer OO/FP‑Sprache – vorzugsweise Java oder Kotlin - Verständnis von Microservice‑Architekturen, REST‑API‑Design‑Patterns und Backend‑Entwicklung - Solide SQL‑Kenntnisse und Erfahrung mit relationalen Datenbanken (MySQL, Vertica, PostgreSQL oder Ähnliches) - Erfahrung mit ETL‑Tools oder Datenintegrationsplattformen (Talend, Informatica, SSIS oder Ähnliches) - Fähigkeit, effektiv in einem funktionsübergreifenden, mehrsprachigen Umfeld zu arbeiten, Geschäftsanforderungen in technische Lösungen zu übersetzen und Wissen mit Kolleg*innen zu teilen ### Wünschenswert: - Hintergrund in Finanzsystemen, E‑Commerce oder der Reisebranche - Spezifische Erfahrung mit Talend 7 oder Talend 8 - Vertrautheit mit CI/CD‑Pipelines und DevOps‑Praktiken - Erfahrung mit Git und Versions‑Control‑Workflows - Erfahrung mit Clean Code, SOLID‑Prinzipien und einer agilen Denkweise - Erfahrung mit dem Spring/Spring‑Boot‑Ökosystem ## Zusätzliche Informationen ### Vorteile bei uns: #### Wie wir zusammenarbeiten: - Ein inklusives, freundliches und internationales Umfeld (Sie arbeiten mit Kolleg*innen aus über 10 Ländern und mehr als 48 Nationalitäten) - Kürzere Arbeitswoche (36 h Vollzeit) mit einem halben Arbeitstag am Freitag - Flexible Start‑ und Endzeiten, Kernarbeitszeit von 10:00 bis 16:00 Uhr - Möglichkeit, für einen definierten Zeitraum im Jahr von überall aus zu arbeiten, gemäß lokaler Regelungen #### Wie wir gemeinsam lernen: - Fri‑Yays: halber Freitagmorgen ohne Meetings, gewidmet tiefem Arbeiten, persönlicher Weiterentwicklung, Lernen und Training bzw. Fokuszeit. - Trainingspfade für professionelle und Management‑Kompetenzen, Zugang zu E‑Learning‑Plattformen wie O’Reilly, Udemy, Coursera (je nach Abteilung) und zu unserer internen Plattform mit maßgeschneiderten Trainingsinhalten #### Weitere Vorteile: - 2 bezahlte Tage pro Jahr für ehrenamtliche Tätigkeiten - Gelegentliche Social‑Events zur Förderung von Kollegialität - Reisebranche‑Rabatte und exklusive Staff‑Tarife - Wir unterstützen unsere Mitarbeitenden in bedeutenden Lebensphasen mit Urlaubsoptionen (z. B. Elternzeit, Heirat, Trauer, Umzug usw.) im Einklang mit den lokalen Gesetzen. - Wir würden uns freuen, Sie hier zu haben – wir auch! ### Auswahlprozess Schritte*: - HR‑Interview (15‑30 Minuten) - Manager‑Interview - Technischer Test - Angebot (*Bitte beachten Sie, dass der Prozess leicht variieren kann. Der zuständige Recruiter wird weitere Details bei der Terminvereinbarung mitteilen) ### Unser Engagement für Vielfalt und Zugehörigkeit Im Herzen unserer Kultur steht das Bekenntnis zu Inklusion über Rasse, Geschlecht, Alter, sexuelle Orientierung, Religion, Geschlechtsidentität oder -ausdruck und Barrierefreiheit. Wir glauben fest an einen Chancengleichheitsraum, der einladend ist und die Einzigartigkeit jedes Einzelnen feiert. Wir schätzen unterschiedliche Lebenserfahrungen und respektieren verschiedene Standpunkte, da wir wissen, dass Einzigartigkeit Innovation fördert. Wir möchten sicherstellen, dass unsere Mitarbeitenden die Gemeinschaften weltweit widerspiegeln, die wir beim Reisen unterstützen. ### Kriterien der Berechtigung: Durch die Übermittlung Ihrer Daten und Bewerbung bestätigen Sie, dass Sie rechtlich befugt sind, im jeweiligen Beschäftigungsland zu arbeiten und keine Visa‑Sponsorship benötigen.
requirements: Mit Technologie verwandeln wir spontane Gedanken in bedeutungsvolle Erlebnisse und helfen Menschen, die Welt zu bereisen.
Vollzeit – Hauptsprache:
Wir schätzen unterschiedliche Lebenserfahrungen und respektieren verschiedene Standpunkte, da wir wissen, dass Einzigartigkeit Innovation fördert.

fr.title: Ingénieur Logiciel – ETL et Microservices
fr.description: Descrizione Software Engineer – ETLs Careers Software Engineer – ETLs & Microservices Share this job: Software Engineer – ETLs & MicroservicesSoftware Engineer – ETLs & Microservicescorporate.lastminute.comhttps://corporate.lastminute.com/careers/job/?id=744000108444345&jobName=Software%20Engineer%20%E2%80%93%20ETLs ## L'entreprise Chez lastminute.com, nous vivons pour les vacances. Nous sommes le leader européen Travel‑Tech des forfaits vacances dynamiques. Avec la technologie, nous transformons les pensées spontanées en expériences significatives, aidant les gens à voyager à travers le monde. ## Description du poste Nous recherchons un Ingénieur Logiciel – Microservices & ETL pour rejoindre notre équipe d’environ 1 700 personnes dans le monde afin d’alimenter le parcours des millions de vacanciers. Si vous êtes passionné par la création de microservices évolutifs, le développement d’API robustes et la modernisation des flux d’intégration de données, continuez votre lecture, vous pourriez être le candidat idéal pour ce rôle. ## Le poste en bref : - Titre du poste – Software Engineer - Modèle de travail – hybride depuis Chiasso - Équipe – vous rejoindrez l’équipe Finance Systems Engineering - Niveau – Professionnel - Lieu – Chiasso, Suisse - Contrat – CDI – temps plein (36 h/semaine) ## Votre impact sera : - Moderniser les processus hérités : migrer progressivement les workflows ETL monolithiques vers un écosystème basé sur les microservices, en identifiant les opportunités de réduction de la dette technique. - Développer des microservices : concevoir, écrire et tester des logiciels de haute qualité en appliquant des pratiques telles que TDD, DDD, Clean Code et les principes SOLID. - Soutenir l’infrastructure de données : maintenir et optimiser les pipelines ETL existants construits avec Talend 7/8, assurant la continuité opérationnelle grâce aux activités KLO (Keep‑the‑Lights‑On). - Automatiser les opérations financières : collaborer étroitement avec les parties prenantes Finance pour comprendre leurs besoins et fournir des solutions qui automatisent les processus manuels ou récurrents. - Titre du poste : - Marque : lastminute.com - Département : Technology - Lieu : Chiasso, Suisse - Contrat : Full‑time - Langue principale : Anglais - Postulez maintenant ## Qualifications ### Votre expertise : - 1 + ans d’expérience en développement logiciel, avec une expérience pratique d’un langage OO/FP — de préférence Java ou Kotlin - Compréhension de l’architecture microservices, des modèles de conception d’API REST et du développement backend - Solides compétences SQL et expérience préalable avec des bases de données relationnelles (MySQL, Vertica, PostgreSQL ou similaires) - Expérience avec des outils ETL ou des plateformes d’intégration de données (Talend, Informatica, SSIS ou similaires) - Capacité à travailler efficacement dans un environnement transversal et multilingue, en traduisant les exigences métier en solutions techniques et en partageant les connaissances avec les collègues ### Souhaitable : - Expérience dans les systèmes financiers, le e‑commerce ou le secteur du voyage - Expérience spécifique avec Talend 7 ou Talend 8 - Familiarité avec les pipelines CI/CD et les pratiques DevOps - Expérience avec Git et les workflows de contrôle de version - Expérience antérieure avec Clean Code, principes SOLID et une mentalité Agile - Expérience avec l’écosystème Spring/Spring Boot ## Informations complémentaires ### Avantages de travailler avec nous : #### Comment nous travaillons ensemble : - Un environnement inclusif, convivial et international (vous travaillerez avec des collègues de plus de 10 pays et plus de 48 nationalités) - Semaine de travail plus courte (36 h en temps plein), avec une demi‑journée le vendredi - Horaires flexibles de début et de fin de journée, avec des heures de base de 10 h à 16 h - Possibilité de travailler de n’importe où pendant une période définie chaque année, selon les réglementations locales #### Comment nous apprenons ensemble : - Fri‑Yays : demi‑journée le vendredi matin sans réunions, dédiée au travail en profondeur, à la croissance personnelle, à l’apprentissage et à la formation ou au temps de concentration. - Parcours de formation au développement de compétences professionnelles et managériales, accès à des plateformes e‑learning telles que O’Reilly, Udemy, Coursera (selon le département) et à notre plateforme interne proposant des contenus de formation sur mesure. #### Autres avantages : - 2 jours de congé payés par an pour du bénévolat - Événements sociaux occasionnels pour favoriser les liens entre collègues - Réductions dans le secteur du voyage et tarifs exclusifs pour le personnel - Nous soutenons nos employés lors des moments clés de la vie avec des options de congé (ex. responsabilités parentales, mariages, deuils, déménagements, etc.) conformément aux lois locales. - Vous nous manquez ? Nous aussi ! ### Étapes du processus de sélection* : - Entretien RH (15‑30 minutes) - Entretien avec le manager - Test technique - Offre d’emploi (*Veuillez noter que le processus peut légèrement varier. Le recruteur en charge communiquera plus de détails lors de la planification de l’entretien) ### Notre engagement à célébrer la diversité et à créer un sentiment d’appartenance Au cœur de notre culture se trouve un engagement à l’inclusion concernant la race, le genre, l’âge, l’orientation sexuelle, la religion, l’identité ou l’expression de genre et l’accessibilité. Nous croyons fermement en un espace d’égalité des chances, accueillant et qui célèbre l’unicité de chaque personne qui travaille ici. Nous valorisons les différentes expériences de vie et respectons les points de vue, car nous savons que l’unicité stimule l’innovation. Nous voulons que nos équipes reflètent les communautés du monde entier que nous aidons à voyager. ### Critères d’éligibilité : En soumettant vos informations et votre candidature, vous confirmez être légalement autorisé à travailler dans le pays d’emploi et ne pas nécessiter de parrainage de visa pour obtenir un statut de visa de travail.
requirements: Avec la technologie, nous transformons les pensées spontanées en expériences significatives, aidant les gens à voyager à travers le monde.
Temps plein – Langue principale:
Nous valorisons les différentes expériences de vie et respectons les points de vue, car nous savons que l'unicité stimule l'innovation.

entries.value: Descrizione Software Engineer – ETLs Carriere Software Engineer – ETLs & Microservices Condividi questo lavoro: Software Engineer – ETLs & Microservices Software Engineer – ETLs & Microservicescorporate.lastminute.comhttps://corporate.lastminute.com/careers/job/?id=744000108444345&jobName=Software%20Engineer%20%E2%80%93%20ETLs ## The Company A lastminute.com, viviamo per le festività. Siamo il leader europeo del settore Travel-Tech nei Dynamic Holiday Packages. Con la tecnologia, trasformiamo pensieri spontanei in esperienze significative, aiutando le persone a viaggiare per il mondo. ## Descrizione del lavoro Stiamo cercando un Software Engineer – Microservizi e ETL che si unisse al nostro team di circa 1.700 persone in tutto il mondo, per aiutarci a potenziare il viaggio del viaggiatore per milioni di vacanzieri. Se sei appassionato di costruire microservizi scalabili, sviluppare API robuste e modernizzare i flussi di lavoro di integrazione dei dati, continua a leggere, potresti essere la persona giusta per questo ruolo. ## Il lavoro in breve: - Titolo del lavoro - Software Engineer - Modello di lavoro - ibrido di Chiasso - Team - entrerai nel team di Finance Systems Engineering - Livello - Professional - Location - Chiasso, Svizzera - Contratto - Permanente – tempo pieno (36 ore a settimana) ## Qual è il tuo impatto: - Modernizzare i processi legacy: Transire gradualmente i flussi di lavoro monolitici ETL verso un ecosistema basato sui microservizi, identificando opportunità per ridurre il debito tecnico. - Sviluppare microservizi: progettare, scrivere e testare software di alta qualità utilizzando pratiche come TDD, DDD, Clean Code e principi SOLID. - Supportare l'infrastruttura dati: Mantenere e ottimizzare pipeline ETL esistenti costruite con Talend 7/8, garantendo la piena continuità del business attraverso attività efficaci KLO (Keep-the-Lights-On). - Automatizzare le operazioni finanziarie: collaborare strettamente con gli stakeholder finanziari per comprenderne le esigenze e fornire soluzioni che automatizzino processi manuali o ricorrenti. - Titolo del lavoro: - Marchio: lastminute.com - Dipartimento: Tecnologia - Località: Chiasso, Svizzera - Contratto: Full-time - Lingua principale: inglese - Candidati ora ## Qualifiche ### La tua competenza: - 1+ anni di esperienza nello sviluppo software, con esperienza pratica nell'uso di un linguaggio OO/FP — preferibilmente Java o Kotlin - Comprensione dell'architettura dei microservizi, dei modelli di progettazione REST API e dello sviluppo backend - Solide competenze SQL ed esperienza precedente con database relazionali (MySQL, Vertica, PostgreSQL o simili) - Esperienza precedente con strumenti ETL o piattaforme di integrazione dati (Talend, Informatica, SSIS o simili) - Capacità di lavorare efficacemente in un ambiente multifunzionale e multilingue, traducendo i requisiti aziendali in soluzioni tecniche e condividendo conoscenze con i colleghi ### Desiderabile: - Background in sistemi finanziari, e-commerce o settore dei viaggi - Esperienza specifica con Talend 7 o Talend 8 - Familiarità con pipeline CI/CD e DevOps pratiche - Esperienza nell'uso di Git e flussi di lavoro di controllo versione - Esperienza precedente con Clean Code, principi SOLID e mentalità Agile - Esperienza di lavoro con l'ecosistema Spring/Spring Boot ## Informazioni aggiuntive ### Vantaggi di lavorare con noi: #### Come lavoriamo insieme: - Un ambiente inclusivo, amichevole e internazionale (lavorerai con colleghi di +10 paesi e oltre 48 nazionalità) - Settimana lavorativa più corta (36 ore a tempo pieno), con mezza giornata lavorativa il venerdì - Inizio e fine della giornata lavorativa flessibili, con orari principali dalle 22:00 alle 16:00 - Possibilità di lavorare da qualsiasi luogo per un periodo all'anno definito secondo le normative locali #### Come impariamo insieme: - Ven-Evviva: mezza giornata il venerdì mattina con mandato senza riunioni e dedicato al lavoro profondo, crescita personale, apprendimento e formazione e/o tempo di concentrazione. - Percorsi di formazione per lo sviluppo delle competenze professionali e manageriali, accesso a piattaforme di e-learning come O'reilly, Udemy, Coursera (a seconda del dipartimento) e alla nostra piattaforma interna che offre contenuti di formazione su misura ##### Altri vantaggi: - 2 giorni di ferie retribuite all'anno per volontariato - Occasionali eventi sociali per favorire le connessioni tra colleghi - Sconti nel settore dei viaggi e tariffe esclusive per il personale - Supportiamo i nostri dipendenti nei momenti più significativi della vita con il congedo opzioni (ad esempio responsabilità genitoriali, matrimoni, lutti, trasferimenti, ecc.) in linea con le leggi locali. - Vorresti essere qui? Anche noi! ### Fasi del processo di selezione*: - Intervista HR (15-30 minuti) - Intervista con il Manager - Test Tecnico - Offerta estesa (*Si prega di notare che il processo può variare leggermente. Il recruiter responsabile condividerà maggiori dettagli al momento dell'organizzazione del colloquio) ### Il nostro impegno a celebrare la diversità e a generare appartenenza Al centro della nostra cultura c'è l'impegno per l'inclusione attraverso razza, genere, età, orientamento sessuale, religione, identità o espressione di genere e accessibilità. Crediamo fermamente in uno spazio di pari opportunità, accogliente e che celebri l'unicità di tutti coloro che lavorano qui. Valorizziamo esperienze di vita diverse e rispettiamo i punti di vista, poiché sappiamo che l'unicità guida l'innovazione. Vogliamo assicurarci che le nostre persone riflettano le comunità di tutto il mondo che aiutiamo a viaggiare. ### Criteri di idoneità: Inviando le tue informazioni e la domanda, confermi di essere legalmente autorizzato a lavorare nel paese di lavoro e di non aver bisogno di sponsorizzazione per ottenere lo status di visto di lavoro. Torna alla ricerca di lavoro

en.title: Reservations Agent  (m/w/d)
en.description: Reservations Agent (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Unbefristet / Permanent. Stellenantritt: 2026-04-01. ## This is what you move with us Competently handle reservations for individual and group guests as the first point of contact, ensuring the highest level of professionalism and proactive attention to detail Maintain and update guest databases with the utmost accuracy, contributing significantly to guest satisfaction and loyalty Address and resolve guest complaints promptly and with sensitivity, always finding the most suitable solution in a discreet and efficient manner Manage multichannel communication, responding to all incoming enquiries by phone and email Coordinate with other departments to ensure optimal alignment between room and event occupancy and our F&B and Spa offerings Support the Reservations Manager with administrative tasks, ensure adherence to our high standards, and contribute to the continuous improvement of our products ## This is you Charisma and friendliness with a natural warmth and refined manners, combined with a keen sense for the needs of discerning guests Team spirit and flexibility, with excellent communication skills and the ability to adapt in a dynamic work environment Experience in luxury hospitality, with completed vocational training and at least two years of experience in a 5-star hotel in Front Office or Reservations Strong language skills in German and English (written and spoken); additional languages such as Italian are an advantage Technical proficiency in Opera Cloud, Microsoft Word, Excel, and Outlook, as well as experience managing online booking channels Exceptional organisational skills and customer focus, ensuring precise planning, discreet guest relations, and outstanding service delivery ## Benefits At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks. Apply now ## Assistant Reservations Manager (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture: This is what you move with usYou are the voice of our hotel: Whether by phone or email, you craft compelling offers, confirm bookings, and ensure follow-ups are handled with precision – all in line with LHW and ISO standards.You think in terms of occupancy and opportunity: You keep our reservations plan accurate and up to date, actively contributing to the optimal utilization of our room inventory.You bring numbers to life: In close collaboration with the Executive Assistant Manager and Front Office Manager, you develop forecasts and reports that are essential for daily planning.You are meticulous with data: Guest profiles and databases are maintained with care and discretion – structure and compliance are part of your DNA.You stay ahead of the curve: From managing the Channel Manager system to continuously refining our ISO and RIMS standards – you ensure smooth operations and bring fresh ideas to the table.You turn potential into performance: Upselling is more than a task to you – it’s a way to enhance the guest journey and create meaningful added value.Why join us? Because you’ll be part of one of Switzerland’s most renowned hotels – a place where you don’t just work, you help shape the future. You’ll be surrounded by passionate professionals and experience a team culture defined by elegance, authenticity, and collaboration. This is youProfessional background: You have completed vocational training in hospitality or a commercial field – ideally within luxury hospitality – and offer several years of relevant experience. Sales mindset: You understand what drives booking decisions and how to elevate the guest experience through strategic room sales. Language skills: You speak and write fluently in German and English; additional knowledge of French or Italian is a plus. Composure & clarity: Whether under pressure or in direct guest communication, you remain professional, efficient, and warm. Drive & growth orientation: You are eager not just to meet expectations but to improve processes and invest in your own development. BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks. ## Nachtportier/ Night Auditor (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture: This is what you move with usFront Office & Guest: Handling late check-ins and early check-outs, providing professional guest assistance via telephone, and fulfilling special guest requests.Valet & Luggage Service: Parking guest vehicles in the garage as well as assisting with luggage service and rooming.Night Audit: Completing the daily closing in the system (Opera Cloud), auditing outlet reports, and managing physical cash handling for the accounting department.Security & Control: Conducting regular security rounds, monitoring the fire alarm panel, and ensuring night-time peace and quiet throughout the premises.Preparation: Generating department reports, purchasing and posting newspapers, and providing shoe shine services for our guests. This is youExperience: A solid background in the hotel industry (preferably in the 5-star segment) and ideally previous experience in night shifts.IT Proficiency: Confident handling of PMS systems (Opera Cloud) as well as standard MS Office applications.Languages: Fluent in German and English; knowledge of Italian is a significant advantage due to our location and clientele.Commitment: A valid driver’s license and the physical fitness required for security rounds and luggage handling.Personality: A high sense of responsibility, absolute discretion, and a polished appearance that meets our luxury standards. BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks. ## Driver (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture: This is what you move with usWarm welcome for our guests: With your natural friendliness and charisma, you make every guest feel at home from the very first moment.Valet parking: You park our guests' vehicles in the underground garage and manage garage logistics, always with attention to detail and order.Guest transfers: Whether it’s from the ski lift or to the restaurant, you handle guest transfers with the hotel shuttle, ensuring a safe and pleasant ride.Guest services: loading/ unloading the guests luggage and handling small errands as needed. This is youNatural Friendliness and Charisma: You can almost anticipate the needs of our discerning guests and make every effort to ensure their stay is as pleasant as possible.Groomed Appearance and Excellent Manners: You represent our hotel with style, impressing with professional politeness and an elegant demeanor.Team Spirit and Flexibility: You enjoy working in a dynamic team, quickly adapting to various demands, always with a smile.Valid Driver's License: Of course, you have a valid driver's license and feel comfortable maneuvering in tight parking spaces and on the road.Language Skills: Ideally, you speak German and English, with additional languages (particularly Italian) being a welcome advantage. BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks.

it.title: Addetto/a alle Prenotazioni
it.description: Addetto/a alle Prenotazioni (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Grigioni). Orario: 100%. Contratto: Indeterminato / Permanente. Inizio impiego: 2026-04-01. ## Questo è ciò che farai con noi Gestire con competenza le prenotazioni per ospiti individuali e di gruppo come primo punto di contatto, garantendo il massimo livello di professionalità e attenzione proattiva ai dettagli Mantenere e aggiornare i database degli ospiti con la massima accuratezza, contribuendo in modo significativo alla soddisfazione e alla fedeltà degli ospiti Affrontare e risolvere i reclami degli ospiti in modo tempestivo e sensibile, trovando sempre la soluzione più adatta in modo discreto ed efficiente Gestire la comunicazione multicanale, rispondendo a tutte le richieste in arrivo per telefono ed email Coordinarsi con altri reparti per garantire un allineamento ottimale tra occupazione delle camere ed eventi e le nostre offerte F&B e Spa Supportare il Responsabile Prenotazioni con compiti amministrativi, garantire il rispetto dei nostri elevati standard e contribuire al miglioramento continuo dei nostri prodotti ## Questo sei tu Carisma e cordialità con un calore naturale e modi raffinati, uniti a un acuto senso per le esigenze degli ospiti più esigenti Spirito di squadra e flessibilità, con eccellenti capacità comunicative e la capacità di adattarsi in un ambiente di lavoro dinamico Esperienza nell'ospitalità di lusso, con formazione professionale completata e almeno due anni di esperienza in un hotel a 5 stelle in Front Office o Prenotazioni Forti competenze linguistiche in tedesco e inglese (scritto e parlato); lingue aggiuntive come l'italiano sono un vantaggio Competenza tecnica in Opera Cloud, Microsoft Word, Excel e Outlook, nonché esperienza nella gestione dei canali di prenotazione online Eccezionali capacità organizzative e attenzione al cliente, garantendo una pianificazione precisa, relazioni discrete con gli ospiti e un servizio eccezionale ## Benefici Al Kulm Group, i nostri dipendenti sono il cuore del nostro successo. Offriamo interessanti opportunità di sviluppo, alloggi confortevoli, pasti a prezzi accessibili nel ristorante del personale e numerosi vantaggi.

de.title: Mitarbeiter/in Reservierung
de.description: Mitarbeiter/in Reservierung (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Unbefristet / Permanent. Stellenantritt: 2026-04-01. ## Das bewegst du bei uns Kompetente Bearbeitung von Reservationen für Individual- und Gruppen Gästen als erste Ansprechperson mit höchstem Mass an Professionalität und proaktiver Detailgenauigkeit Pflege und Aktualisierung von Gästedatenbanken mit grösster Sorgfalt, was massgeblich zur Gästezufriedenheit und -bindung beiträgt Bearbeitung und Lösung von Gästewünschen und -beschwerden zeitnah und mit Fingerspitzengefühl, stets die passendste Lösung diskret und effizient finden Bewirtschaftung der Multichannel-Kommunikation, Beantwortung aller eingehenden Anfragen per Telefon und E-Mail Koordination mit anderen Abteilungen zur optimalen Abstimmung von Zimmer- und Eventauslastung mit unseren F&B- und Spa-Angeboten Unterstützung des Reservations Managers bei administrativen Aufgaben, Sicherstellung der Einhaltung unserer hohen Standards und Beitrag zur kontinuierlichen Verbesserung unserer Produkte ## Das bist du Charisma und Freundlichkeit mit natürlicher Wärme und gepflegten Umgangsformen, gepaart mit einem feinen Gespür für die Bedürfnisse anspruchsvoller Gäste Teamgeist und Flexibilität, mit exzellenten Kommunikationsfähigkeiten und der Fähigkeit, sich in einem dynamischen Arbeitsumfeld zurechtzufinden Erfahrung in der Luxushotellerie, mit abgeschlossener Berufsausbildung und mindestens zweijähriger Erfahrung in einem 5-Sterne-Hotel im Front Office oder in der Reservation Starke Sprachkenntnisse in Deutsch und Englisch (schriftlich und mündlich); zusätzliche Sprachen wie Italienisch sind von Vorteil Technische Affinität zu Opera Cloud, Microsoft Word, Excel und Outlook sowie Erfahrung im Umgang mit Online-Buchungskanälen Aussergewöhnliche organisatorische Fähigkeiten und Kundenorientierung, die präzise Planung, diskrete Gästebetreuung und herausragende Serviceleistungen gewährleisten ## Benefits Bei der Kulm Group sind unsere Mitarbeitenden das Herzstück unseres Erfolgs. Wir bieten attraktive Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten, komfortable Unterkünfte, preiswerte Verpflegung im Personalrestaurant und zahlreiche Vergünstigungen. Jetzt bewerben ## Assistant Reservations Manager (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% People at 1800m above sea level shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture: This is what you move with usYou are the voice of our hotel: Whether by phone or email, you craft compelling offers, confirm bookings, and ensure follow-ups are handled with precision – all in line with LHW and ISO standards.You think in terms of occupancy and opportunity: You keep our reservations plan accurate and up to date, actively contributing to the optimal utilization of our room inventory.You bring numbers to life: In close collaboration with the Executive Assistant Manager and Front Office Manager, you develop forecasts and reports that are essential for daily planning.You are meticulous with data: Guest profiles and databases are maintained with care and discretion – structure and compliance are part of your DNA.You stay ahead of the curve: From managing the Channel Manager system to continuously refining our ISO and RIMS standards – you ensure smooth operations and bring fresh ideas to the table.You turn potential into performance: Upselling is more than a task to you – it’s a way to enhance the guest journey and create meaningful added value.Why join us? Because you’ll be part of one of Switzerland’s most renowned hotels – a place where you don’t just work, you help shape the future. You’ll be surrounded by passionate professionals and experience a team culture defined by elegance, authenticity, and collaboration. This is youProfessional background: You have completed vocational training in hospitality or a commercial field – ideally within luxury hospitality – and offer several years of relevant experience. Sales mindset: You understand what drives booking decisions and how to elevate the guest experience through strategic room sales. Language skills: You speak and write fluently in German and English; additional knowledge of French or Italian is a plus. Composure & clarity: Whether under pressure or in direct guest communication, you remain professional, efficient, and warm. Drive & growth orientation: You are eager not just to meet expectations but to improve processes and invest in your own development. BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks. ## Nachtportier / Night Auditor (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% People at 1800m above sea level shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture: This is what you move with usFront Office & Guest: Handling late check-ins and early check-outs, providing professional guest assistance via telephone, and fulfilling special guest requests.Valet & Luggage Service: Parking guest vehicles in the garage as well as assisting with luggage service and rooming.Night Audit: Completing the daily closing in the system (Opera Cloud), auditing outlet reports, and managing physical cash handling for the accounting department.Security & Control: Conducting regular security rounds, monitoring the fire alarm panel, and ensuring night-time peace and quiet throughout the premises.Preparation: Generating department reports, purchasing and posting newspapers, and providing shoe shine services for our guests. This is youExperience: A solid background in the hotel industry (preferably in the 5-star segment) and ideally previous experience in night shifts.IT Proficiency: Confident handling of PMS systems (Opera Cloud) as well as standard MS Office applications.Languages: Fluent in German and English; knowledge of Italian is a significant advantage due to our location and clientele.Commitment: A valid driver’s license and the physical fitness required for security rounds and luggage handling.Personality: A high sense of responsibility, absolute discretion, and a polished appearance that meets our luxury standards. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks. ## Chauffeur (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% People at 1800m above sea level shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture: This is what you move with usWarm welcome for our guests: With your natural friendliness and charisma, you make every guest feel at home from the very first moment.Valet parking: You park our guests' vehicles in the underground garage and manage garage logistics, always with attention to detail and order.Guest transfers: Whether it’s from the ski lift or to the restaurant, you handle guest transfers with the hotel shuttle, ensuring a safe and pleasant ride.Guest services: loading/ unloading the guests luggage and handling small errands as needed. This is youNatural Friendliness and Charisma: You can almost anticipate the needs of our discerning guests and make every effort to ensure their stay is as pleasant as possible.Groomed Appearance and Excellent Manners: You represent our hotel with style, impressing with professional politeness and an elegant demeanor.Team Spirit and Flexibility: You enjoy working in a dynamic team, quickly adapting to various demands, always with a smile.Valid Driver's License: Of course, you have a valid driver's license and feel comfortable maneuvering in tight parking spaces and on the road.Language Skills: Ideally, you speak German and English, with additional languages (particularly Italian) being a welcome advantage. fr.title: Agent(e) de Réservation
fr.description: Agent(e) de Réservation (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadine, Grisons). Taux d'occupation : 100%. Contrat : Indéterminé / Permanent. Date de début : 2026-04-01. ## Ce que vous ferez avec nous Traiter avec compétence les réservations des clients individuels et de groupe en tant que premier point de contact, en garantissant le plus haut niveau de professionnalisme et une attention proactive aux détails Maintenir et mettre à jour les bases de données clients avec la plus grande précision, contribuant ainsi de manière significative à la satisfaction et à la fidélité des clients Traiter et résoudre les réclamations des clients rapidement et avec tact, en trouvant toujours la solution la plus appropriée de manière discrète et efficace Gérer la communication multicanale, en répondant à toutes les demandes entrantes par téléphone et par e-mail Coordonner avec les autres départements pour assurer un alignement optimal entre l'occupation des chambres et des événements et nos offres de restauration et de spa Soutenir le Responsable des Réservations dans les tâches administratives, assurer le respect de nos normes élevées et contribuer à l'amélioration continue de nos produits ## Ce que vous apportez Charisme et convivialité avec une chaleur naturelle et des manières raffinées, combinés à un sens aigu des besoins des clients exigeants Esprit d'équipe et flexibilité, avec d'excellentes compétences en communication et la capacité de s'adapter dans un environnement de travail dynamique Expérience dans l'hôtellerie de luxe, avec une formation professionnelle terminée et au moins deux ans d'expérience dans un hôtel 5 étoiles en Front Office ou en Réservation Solides compétences linguistiques en allemand et en anglais (écrit et parlé) ; des langues supplémentaires comme l'italien sont un avantage Maîtrise technique d'Opera Cloud, Microsoft Word, Excel et Outlook, ainsi qu'une expérience dans la gestion des canaux de réservation en ligne Compétences organisationnelles exceptionnelles et orientation client, garantissant une planification précise, des relations clients discrètes et une prestation de service exceptionnelle ## Avantages Chez Kulm Group, nos employés sont le cœur de notre succès. Nous offrons des opportunités de développement attrayantes, des logements confortables, des repas abordables au restaurant du personnel et de nombreux avantages. Questo sei tuEsperienza: un solido

en.title: Food and Beverage Assistant (m/w/d)
en.description: Food and Beverage Assistant (m/w/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadin, Graubünden). Pensum: 100%. Vertrag: Unbefristet / Permanent. Stellenantritt: 2026-04-01. ## This is what you move with us In this versatile key position, you are the “Enabler” of our entire F&B division. You bridge the gap between administrative precision, cutting-edge hospitality technology, and front-of-house operations. You ensure that technical processes run flawlessly in the background while proactively supporting the F&B management in their daily business.Your Mission - Where Culinary Delight meets Logistics:Reservation Management: You are the primary point of contact for reservations (on-site, phone, email) via our software for all hotel outlets. Menu Design & Coordination: In close collaboration with the kitchen, marketing, and restaurant management, you coordinate and update our menus via “Ai-web-to-print.” Daily Operations: During the season, you create daily half-board menus, staff menus, and buffet labeling using “Ai-web-to-print” and “Viewneo.” Guest Experiences: You process individual guest requests for aperitifs or birthdays, ensuring that "extra touch" that defines our service. Amenity Management: Coordinate guest amenities with the Front Office and Room Service, including payment processing via “Saferpay” and “Opera.” Front-Line Support: When needed, you actively support our team directly in service, staying close to our guests. Quality Ambassador: You ensure compliance with the highest standards (LQA and Forbes Travel Guide) and professionally handle guest feedback and complaints. Administrative Excellence: Preparation of corporate invoices and general correspondence (office share approx. 80–90%). ## This is you Foundation: Completed hotel or commercial apprenticeship, as well as professional experience in a similar role, ideally within the luxury hospitality industry. Linguistic Excellence: Business fluent in German and English (written and spoken). Italian is a significant asset. IT Proficiency: Confident handling of MS Office and hotel systems (e.g., Opera Cloud). Personality: You are an organizational talent with absolute reliability and discretion. You remain calm and solution-oriented, even under high pressure. Host Mindset: You communicate at the highest service level, possess a poised appearance, and apply a “hands-on” mentality when it counts. Why the Kulm Group? We offer you a workplace where tradition meets innovation. You will have the freedom to actively shape processes and benefit from the attractive perks of one of Switzerland's most renowned hotel groups.Ready to shape the F&B world of tomorrow? We look forward to receiving your application! ## Benefits At Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks. Apply now ## Cook - Staff Restaurant (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture: Your MissionYour stage – our heart behind the scenes: At our hotel, it's not just our guests who take center stage – our employees also deserve culinary moments that inspire. As Cook in our newly established Staff Restaurant, you are both host and culinary expert. With fresh, creative cuisine and an open ear for the wishes of our team, you help ensure that our colleagues feel truly at home. Your Responsibilities Preparation of varied, balanced menus for our team – with attention to detail and a passion for quality Being a host in the staff restaurant: welcoming, engaging, and creating a positive atmosphere Menu planning and implementation of culinary theme weeks – your ideas are welcome Combination of buffet service and live cooking Ensuring smooth operations in your section – from mise en place to spotless kitchen closure Adherence to hygiene regulations according to HACCP – cleanliness is second nature to you Close collaboration with the kitchen team, purchasing, and HR – to ensure a great experience for our crew This is youCompleted training as a certified chef or equivalent qualification Experience in both hot and cold kitchen, ideally in communal catering or the hotel industry A passion for working with people – you enjoy being a host, even for your colleagues Strong organizational skills, resilience, and a structured working style Creativity in menu planning – seasonal, balanced, and full of flavor Good German and English skills, Italian is a plus If you’d like to combine your love for culinary arts with a true host mentality – and contribute to one of the most beautiful hotels in Switzerland – we look forward to receiving your application. BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks. ## Breakfast Cook/ Commis de Cuisine Breakfast (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% People at 1800m above sea level are shaping the Luxury Mountain Travel. Our dynamic and international community offers our guests smart Luxury for an inimitable holiday experience. As a member of the Luxury Kulm Group you are part of the key to our success. Together, we make every stay deeply inspiring, unique and distinctive. And as such, we embrace our culture: understated luxury, inspiration, and a life experience. Together, we make it happen. This is your chance to be a member of our shaping culture: This is what you move with usIt is not just about cooking; it is about orchestrating the most important moment of the day in an environment of the highest standard.Creativity at the Buffet: You are responsible for the preparation and presentation of our magnificent daily buffet. From precisely sliced fresh fruits to the finest small pastries – every detail matters.Master of Egg Dishes: Whether it is fluffy omelets or perfect Eggs Benedict – you prepare à la carte orders with mastery and speed.Quality and Care: You oversee the storage of raw materials and guarantee absolute freshness. Order and hygiene (HACCP) are your calling card.Team Spirit: When needed, you actively support the Chefs de Partie and work together to maintain our excellent standards.start June, end ca. 06.04.2027 This is youThe early bird catches the worm. While others are still slumbering, you are performing at your best. We are looking for a sunny personality who loves the early morning and accompanies our guests into the day with energy and a smile:Education: You are a certified chef or have at least 2 years of specific professional experience in this field.Skills: You have mastered various cooking methods and breakfast pastry arts.Mindset: You implement the hotel's standard recipes with confidence and have an eye for continuous improvement.Reliability: Punctuality, as well as maintaining personal hygiene and a clean workspace, are second nature to you.Languages: Italian as well as English or German.Why Kronenhof:Working with us means becoming part of a legend in Swiss hospitality – in an environment where talent is truly valued.We offer stable employment in one of the most exclusive locations in the world.Life in the Engadin: We support you with the logistics! We provide staff housing at fair, fixed prices, so you can enjoy the nature and activities in Pontresina stress-free.Growth: Continuous training and development opportunities.Would you like to bring your passion into our kitchen and make breakfast at the Grand Hotel Kronenhof shine? We look forward to receiving your application! BenefitsAt Kulm Group, our employees are the heart of our success. We offer attractive development opportunities, comfortable accommodations, affordable meals in the staff restaurant, and numerous perks. ## Maître de Rang (m/w/d) Grand Hotel Kronenhof 100% Elevate your career to new heights at 1800 meters above sea level and become part of the Kulm Group family. Are you ready to redefine the luxury mountain travel experience? Join our dynamic and international team at Kulm Group, where together we provide our guests with a unique luxury experience and create unforgettable memories. Why Kulm Group?Pursuit of Excellence: Excellence is at the heart of everything we do. We strive daily to achieve the best and delight our guests and employees.Passionate Team: Work in a vibrant, international team that supports and inspires each other. Experience true camaraderie and team spirit with us.Career Opportunities: Unlock your potential and grow with us. We are committed to your personal and professional development.Unique Culture: Immerse yourself in a work environment that values creativity, passion, and authenticity. As Cook in our newly established Staff Restaurant, you are both host and culinary expert. With fresh, creative cuisine and an open ear for the wishes of our team, you help ensure that our colleagues feel truly at home. fr.description: Assistant(e) Restauration & Bar (h/f/d) — Kulm Hotel St. Moritz, St. Moritz (Engadine, Grisons). Taux d'occupation : 100 %. Contrat : Indéterminé / Permanent.
